dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 20-period SMA (short_window) and 80-period SMA (long_window) as specified in parameters. Entry requires bullish crossover confirmed by short_sma > long_sma. Exit triggers on bearish crossover. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal generates both long entries and exits but no explicit short entries.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 20-period SMA (short_window) and 80-period SMA (long_window) as specified in parameters. Entry requires bullish crossover confirmed by short_sma > long_sma. Exit triggers on bearish crossover. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal generates both long entries and exits but no explicit short entries.

source_rule_text: Generate a long entry signal when the short-term moving average crosses above the long-term moving average (bullish crossover), and generate an exit signal when the short-term moving average crosses below the long-term moving average (bearish crossover).
